case_title: MATANGUIHAN, VICENTE VS JIMENEZ, MANUEL B.

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $375.00 FILED BY MATANGUIHAN, VICENTE AS TO DEFENDANT JIMENEZ, MANUEL B. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR AUG-21-2001 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
